summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Revix CRM v1.2.0 Financial Dashboard consolidation. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Dashboard Financiero loads correctly at /crm/finanzas with all tabs functional.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) on main dashboard - non-blocking but should be investigated

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 1 factura FV-2026-00001 (229.89€), 2 órdenes en estado enviado
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial dashboard consolidation tested successfully. All APIs working: /api/finanzas/dashboard, /api/finanzas/evolucion, /api/finanzas/inventario/valor, /api/finanzas/gastos/detalle, /api/contabilidad/stats, /api/contabilidad/facturas, /api/contabilidad/informes/pendientes. Frontend displays correct data in all 6 tabs: Resumen, Facturas, Cobros y Pagos, Gastos, Inventario, Evolución. Version v1.2.0 visible in sidebar.
verified_features: KPI cards display correct data: Ingresos (459.78€), Gastos (95.00€), Beneficio (364.78€), Inventario (0.00€)
Tab 'Resumen' shows Ingresos Pendientes and Desglose de Gastos
Tab 'Cobros y Pagos' shows 229.89€ pending collection
Tab 'Gastos' shows expenses by provider and materials consumed
Tab 'Evolución' shows monthly evolution table with Mar 2026 data
GET /api/finanzas/dashboard returns resumen, ingresos, gastos, inventario
Period selector works with dia, semana, mes, trimestre, año options
Navigation from sidebar 'FINANZAS Y LOGÍSTICA' section works correctly
